subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned to God, thy Lord, the All-Merciful, who dost circle round the Kaaba of divine knowledge and uttereth His praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المقبل الی الله ربک الرحمن و الطائف حول کعبة العرفان و الناطق بثنائه
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @praise and encouragement, @contention and conflict, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Imam Husayn
